Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************************

 The (eso, ff)-factorization system for enriched categories

 In this file, we construct an orthogonal factorization system on the bicategory of
 enriched categories. This classes of maps in this orthogonal factorization system
 are given by the by the essentially surjective enriched functors and by the fully
 faithful enriched functors. The orthogonality says that for every square as follows

<<
         B₁ --------> C₁
         |            |
       F |            | G
         |            |
         V            V
         B₂ --------> C₂
>>

 where `F` is essentially surjective and `G` is fully faithful, there is a unique
 lift up to unique invertible 2-cell.

 In addition, we must give a factorization for every enriched functor as an
 essentially surjective functor followed by a fully faithful functor. For this,
 we use the full image factorization.

 The main challenge of this construction lies in the proof of orthogonality and
 solving the lifting problems. However, the ideas are the same as for categories.
 Let's say that we have the following square that commutes up to natural
 isomorphism:

<<
               Φ₁
         B₁ --------> C₁
         |            |
       F |            | G
         |            |
         V            V
         B₂ --------> C₂
               Φ₂
>>

 Our goal is to construct a lift `B₂ --> C₁`. To do so, we first show that for every
 object `x : B₂` the type of objects `y : C₁` together with an isomorphism
 `G y ≅ Φ₂ x` is contractible ([iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob]). The reason why
 we use contractability here, is because it allows us to use the assumption that
 `F` is essentially surjectiev (we can only get a preimage for `x` under `F` if
 we are proving a proposition). For morphisms, we do something similar, but
 expressed using morphisms instead of objects.

 Compared to the case of categories, the additional thing that we must do, is
 constructing an enrichment for our lift. The construction of the enrichment
 follows the proof of functoriality, but expressed in the language of enriched
 categories.

 Finally, as a consequence of this factorization system, we deduce that every
 enriched functor that is essentially surjective and fully faithful, is an adjoint
 equivalence as well. Due to the bicategorical phrasing of our proof, we can only
 use this statement if both the source and target of the functor are univalent
 enriched categories. However, in the proof, we only use that the source of the
 functor is univalent.

 Source: Lemma 4.3.5 in Categorical notions of fibration by Loregian and Riehl.

 Contents
 1, The left and right class of the factorization system
 2. Image factorization
 3. Lifts of 1-cells
 4. Lifts of 2-cells
 5. Uniqueness of lifts of 2-cells
 6. Fully faithful 1-cells are closed under invertible 2-cells
 7. The factorization system
 8. Essentially surjective+fully faithful implies adjoint equivalence

 **********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Subcategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Subcategory.Full.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Enrichment.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.EnrichmentTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.EnrichedCats.Examples.ImageEnriched.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.EnrichedCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.OrthogonalFactorization.Orthogonality.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.OrthogonalFactorization.FactorizationSystem.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

Section EnrichedFactorizationSystem.
  Context (V : monoidal_cat).

  (** * 1, The left and right class of the factorization system *)
  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
hProp

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
hProp

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
isaprop (essentially_surjective F)

    abstract
      (intros ;
       apply isaprop_essentially_surjective).
  Defined.

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
hProp

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
hProp

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
isaprop
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor
     (enriched_functor_enrichment F))

    abstract
      (intros ;
       apply isaprop_fully_faithful_enriched_functor).
  Defined.

  (** * 2. Image factorization *)
  Section Factorization.
    Context {C₁ C₂ : enriched_cat V}
            (F : enriched_functor C₁ C₂).

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_cat V

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_cat V

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
univalent_category
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enrichment ?C V

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
univalent_category
 exact (univalent_image F).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enrichment (univalent_image F) V
 exact (image_enrichment C₂ F).
    Defined.

enriched_functor C₁ enriched_image

C₁ ⟶ enriched_image

functor_enrichment ?F C₁ enriched_image

F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
C₁ ⟶ enriched_image
 exact (functor_full_img F).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
functor_enrichment (functor_full_img F) C₁
  enriched_image
 exact (image_proj_enrichment (enriched_functor_enrichment F)).
    Defined.

    
V: monoidal_cat

enriched_image ⟶ C₂

C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
functor_enrichment ?F enriched_image C₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_image ⟶ C₂
 exact (sub_precategory_inclusion _ _).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
functor_enrichment
  (sub_precategory_inclusion C₂
     (full_img_sub_precategory F)) enriched_image C₂
 exact (image_incl_enrichment C₂ F).
    Defined.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell
  (enriched_image_proj · enriched_image_incl) F

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_image_proj · enriched_image_incl ==> F
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
nat_trans_enrichment ?τ
  (enriched_functor_enrichment
     (enriched_image_proj · enriched_image_incl))
  (enriched_functor_enrichment F)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
(enriched_image_proj · enriched_image_incl) ⟹ F
 apply full_image_inclusion_commute_nat_iso.
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
nat_trans_enrichment
  (let X :=
     λ F : C₁ ⟶ C₂,
     pr1 (full_image_inclusion_commute_nat_iso F) in
   X F)
  (enriched_functor_enrichment
     (enriched_image_proj · enriched_image_incl))
  (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
 apply image_factorization_enriched_commutes.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (make_enriched_nat_trans
     (let X :=
        λ F : C₁ ⟶ C₂,
        pr1 (full_image_inclusion_commute_nat_iso F)
        in
      X F)
     (image_factorization_enriched_commutes
        (enriched_functor_enrichment F)))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_enriched_nat_trans
     (let X :=
        λ F : C₁ ⟶ C₂,
        pr1 (full_image_inclusion_commute_nat_iso F)
        in
      X F)
     (image_factorization_enriched_commutes
        (enriched_functor_enrichment F)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_enriched_nat_trans
     (let X :=
        λ F : C₁ ⟶ C₂,
        pr1 (full_image_inclusion_commute_nat_iso F)
        in
      X F)
     (image_factorization_enriched_commutes
        (enriched_functor_enrichment F)) x)

        apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
    Defined.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
factorization_1cell enriched_eso_1cell
  enriched_ff_1cell F

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
factorization_1cell enriched_eso_1cell
  enriched_ff_1cell F

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
bicat_of_enriched_cats V

C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, ?a ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ ?a, C₂ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_eso_1cell C₁ ?a ?l
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_ff_1cell ?a C₂ ?r
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell (?l · ?r) F

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
bicat_of_enriched_cats V
 exact enriched_image.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, enriched_image ⟧
 exact enriched_image_proj.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ enriched_image, C₂ ⟧
 exact enriched_image_incl.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_eso_1cell C₁ enriched_image
  enriched_image_proj
 apply functor_full_img_essentially_surjective.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
enriched_ff_1cell enriched_image C₂
  enriched_image_incl
 apply image_incl_enrichment_fully_faithful.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
invertible_2cell
  (enriched_image_proj · enriched_image_incl) F
 exact enriched_image_comm.
    Defined.
  End Factorization.

  Section Lifting.
    Context {B₁ B₂ C₁ C₂ : enriched_cat V}
            (F : enriched_functor B₁ B₂)
            (G : enriched_functor C₁ C₂)
            (HF : enriched_eso_1cell _ _ F)
            (HG : enriched_ff_1cell _ _ G).

    Let G_fully_faithful : fully_faithful G
      := fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful _ HG.

    (** * 3. Lifts of 1-cells *)
    Section Lift1Cell.
      Context (Φ₁ : enriched_functor B₁ C₁)
              (Φ₂ : enriched_functor B₂ C₂)
              (τ : invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)).

      Let τ_iso : nat_z_iso _ _ := from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched _ τ.

      Section OnOb.
        Context (x : B₂).

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
isaprop (∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
isaprop (∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
isProofIrrelevant (∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
φ₁ = φ₂

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
transportf (λ x0 : C₁, z_iso (G x0) (Φ₂ x)) 
  ?p (pr2 φ₁) = pr2 φ₂

V: monoidal_cat

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F

x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
z_iso (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)

            
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
is_univalent C₁
 apply univalent_category_is_univalent.
            
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
z_iso (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
 exact (make_z_iso'
                       _
                       (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof
                          _ _ _
                          G_fully_faithful
                          _ _
                          (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁) (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))).
          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
transportf (λ x0 : C₁, z_iso (G x0) (Φ₂ x))
  (isotoid C₁ (univalent_category_is_univalent C₁)
     (make_z_iso'
        (fully_faithful_inv_hom G_fully_faithful
           (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
           (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
              (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))
        (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂ G
           G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
           (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
              (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))))
  (pr2 φ₁) = pr2 φ₂
 
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
isPredicate is_z_isomorphism
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
pr1
  (transportf (λ x0 : C₁, z_iso (G x0) (Φ₂ x))
     (isotoid C₁ (univalent_category_is_univalent C₁)
        (make_z_iso'
           (fully_faithful_inv_hom G_fully_faithful
              (pr1 φ₁) 
              (pr1 φ₂)
              (z_iso_comp 
                 (pr2 φ₁)
                 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))
           (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂ G
              G_fully_faithful 
              (pr1 φ₁) 
              (pr1 φ₂)
              (z_iso_comp 
                 (pr2 φ₁)
                 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))))
     (pr2 φ₁)) = pr12 φ₂

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
x0: C₂ ⟦ G (pr1 φ₂), Φ₂ x ⟧
isaprop (is_z_isomorphism x0)

              apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
# G
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (idtoiso
        (isotoid C₁
           (univalent_category_is_univalent C₁)
           (make_z_iso'
              (fully_faithful_inv_hom G_fully_faithful
                 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
                 (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
                    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))
              (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂
                 G G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
                 (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
                    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))))))
· pr2 φ₁ = pr12 φ₂

            
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
inv_from_z_iso
  (functor_on_z_iso G
     (idtoiso
        (isotoid C₁
           (univalent_category_is_univalent C₁)
           (make_z_iso'
              (fully_faithful_inv_hom G_fully_faithful
                 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
                 (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
                    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))
              (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂
                 G G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
                 (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
                    (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))))))
· pr2 φ₁ = pr12 φ₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
pr2 φ₁ =
functor_on_z_iso G
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid C₁ (univalent_category_is_univalent C₁)
        (make_z_iso'
           (fully_faithful_inv_hom G_fully_faithful

                 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))
           (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂ G
              G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
              (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
                 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂)))))))
· pr12 φ₂

  (idtoiso

                 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂)))))))
· pr12 φ₂ = pr2 φ₁

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
# G
  (idtoiso
     (isotoid C₁ (univalent_category_is_univalent C₁)
        (make_z_iso'
           (invmap
              (weq_from_fully_faithful
                 G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂))
              (pr2 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂)))
           (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂ G
              G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
              (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
                 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))))) =
?y'

              
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
# G
  (make_z_iso'
     (invmap
        (weq_from_fully_faithful G_fully_faithful
           (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂))
        (pr2 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂)))
     (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C₁ C₂ G
        G_fully_faithful (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
        (z_iso_comp (pr2 φ₁)
           (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂))))) = ?y'

              apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (G_fully_faithful _ _)) _).
            
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

x: B₂
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ y : C₁, z_iso (G y) (Φ₂ x)
pr2 φ₁ · inv_from_z_iso (pr2 φ₂) · pr12 φ₂ = pr2 φ₁

            apply id_right.
        Qed.

 exact isaprop_enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob.

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
w: B₁
f: z_iso (F w) x
z_iso (G (Φ₁ w)) (Φ₂ x)

            exact (z_iso_comp
                     (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso w)
                     (functor_on_z_iso Φ₂ f)).
        Qed.

        Definition enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob
          : C₁
          := pr11 iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob.

        Definition enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso
          : z_iso (G enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob) (Φ₂ x)
          := pr21 iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob.
      End OnOb.

      Section OnMor.
        Context {x y : B₂}
                (f : x --> y).

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
       enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
# G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
       enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
# G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)

f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop
  (∑
   g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
       enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
   # G g =
   enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
   · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))

   · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
 
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑
   g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
       enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
   # G g =
   enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
   · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))

# G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f

isaprop

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
    enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
# G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
make_weq # G
  (G_fully_faithful (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)) (pr1 φ₁) =
make_weq # G
  (G_fully_faithful (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)) (pr1 φ₂)

            
V: monoidal_cat

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)

f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: ∑
g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
    enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
# G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
# G (pr1 φ₁) = # G (pr1 φ₂)

            exact (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂)).

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C₂ ⟦ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x),
G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y) ⟧

              exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x
                     · # Φ₂ f
                     · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)).
            
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ g : C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
       enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧,
 # G g =
 enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
 · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
  (invmap
     (make_weq # G
        (G_fully_faithful (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
      · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)))
 apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (G_fully_faithful _ _))).
        Qed.

        Definition enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor
          : enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x --> enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y
          := pr11 iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor.

        Definition enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor_eq
          : #G enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor
            =
            enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x
            · #Φ₂ f
            · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
          := pr21 iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor.

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧
p: # G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor = g

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C₁ ⟦ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⟧
p: # G g =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor = g

          exact (!(maponpaths pr1 (pr2 iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor (g ,, p)))).
        Qed.
      End OnMor.

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
functor_data B₂ C₁

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ a b : B₂, B₂ ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C₁ ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

x: B₂
enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor (id₁ x) =
id₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

# G (id₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ (id₁ x)
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)

id₁ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · id₁ (Φ₂ x)
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)

x, y, z: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor (f · g) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor g

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# G
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f
   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor g) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ (f · g)
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)

x, y, z: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f)
· # G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor g) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · (# Φ₂ f · # Φ₂ g)
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)

x, y, z: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y · # Φ₂ g
   · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · (# Φ₂ f · # Φ₂ g)
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

x, y, z: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x
· (# Φ₂ f
   · (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
      · (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y
         · (# Φ₂ g
            · inv_from_z_iso
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))))) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x
· (# Φ₂ f
   · (# Φ₂ g
      · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)))

f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y
   · (# Φ₂ g
      · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))) =
# Φ₂ g · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)

inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y · # Φ₂ g
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z) =
# Φ₂ g · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)

f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₁ (Φ₂ y) · # Φ₂ g
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z) =
# Φ₂ g · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z)

f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧

functor_data B₂ C₁
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
is_functor ?F

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
functor_data B₂ C₁
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_data.
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
is_functor enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_data
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_laws.
      Defined.

      Definition enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data
        : functor_enrichment_data enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor B₂ C₁
        := λ x y,
           enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
           · precomp_arr C₂ _ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
           · postcomp_arr C₂ _ (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
           · inv_from_z_iso (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG _ _).

      Arguments enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data /.

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
is_functor_enrichment
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x : B₂,
enriched_id B₂ x
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x x =
enriched_id C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor x)
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x y z : B₂,
enriched_comp B₂ x y z
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x z =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data y z
#⊗ enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x y
· enriched_comp C₁ 
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor z)
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ (x y : B₂) (f : B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr C₁
  (# enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr B₂ f
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x y

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful

Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x : B₂,
enriched_id B₂ x
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x x =
enriched_id C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor x)
 
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_id B₂ x
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x x
   · precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
       (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))) =
enriched_id C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_id B₂ x · enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x x
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ x) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =
enriched_id C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_id C₂ (Φ₂ x)
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ x) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

x: B₂
enriched_from_arr C₂ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_from_arr C₂
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x
   · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_from_arr C₂
  (id₁ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =
enriched_id C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_id C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_id C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =
enriched_id C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
· id₁
    (C₁ ⦃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
     enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₂
enriched_id C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) =
enriched_id C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x y z : B₂,
enriched_comp B₂ x y z
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x z =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data y z
#⊗ enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x y
· enriched_comp C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor z)

x, y, z: B₂
enriched_comp B₂ x y z
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x z
   · precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
       (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))) =
(enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ y z
 · precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))
#⊗ (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
    · precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

    · inv_from_z_iso

           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))
· enriched_comp C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)

· enriched_comp C₂ (Φ₂ x) (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)

x, y, z: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ y z
#⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· (enriched_comp C₂ (Φ₂ x) (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
         · inv_from_z_iso

 · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
    · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))))
#⊗ (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
    · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
         (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
       · (postcomp_arr C₂

          · inv_from_z_iso

                 HG (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

#⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· (enriched_comp C₂ (Φ₂ x) (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)

enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ y z
#⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
        (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))

  #⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)

           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)

x, y, z: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ y z
#⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· (enriched_comp C₂ (Φ₂ x) (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
         · inv_from_z_iso
             (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)

enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ y z
#⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· ((precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
    · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))))
   #⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
         (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
       · (postcomp_arr C₂

          · inv_from_z_iso

       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

x, y, z: B₂
enriched_comp C₂ (Φ₂ x) (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
· (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
   · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
      · inv_from_z_iso

 · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
      (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
enriched_comp C₂ (Φ₂ x) (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) =

 · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, Φ₂ z ⦄)
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) =
(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))
· enriched_comp C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, Φ₂ z ⦄)
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· (enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
   · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
             (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
             (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))) =
(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
      (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))))
· enriched_comp C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

x, y, z: B₂
?b =

 · (postcomp_arr C₂ 
      (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
      (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))

#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂

            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
       · inv_from_z_iso
           (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))))
· enriched_comp C₁

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

x, y, z: B₂
enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
· (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
   · inv_from_z_iso

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

x, y, z: B₂
enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (Φ₂ y) (Φ₂ z)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
· inv_from_z_iso

       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) = ?t2

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

x, y, z: B₂
postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
#⊗ id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄)
· enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) = ?t2

            apply idpath.

  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· (enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))
   · inv_from_z_iso

· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment G
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
· enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
?b =
postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· enriched_comp C₂ 
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)) 
    (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
 · inv_from_z_iso
     (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
    · inv_from_z_iso
        (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))
· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)
  #⊗ enriched_functor_enrichment G
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
· enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) = ?b

x, y, z: B₂
(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
 · inv_from_z_iso

        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)

           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))
· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)

       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y) = ?y'

Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
 · inv_from_z_iso

        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
      (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
    · (inv_from_z_iso
         (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))
       · enriched_functor_enrichment G
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
           (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
       · (inv_from_z_iso
            (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
               (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
               (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
          · enriched_functor_enrichment G
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))) = ?y'

(precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ z) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
 · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
      (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
    · id₁
        (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y),
         G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)))
#⊗ (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
    · (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
       · id₁
           (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x),
            G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y) ⦄))) = ?y'

  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
· precomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

(postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
   (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))

  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)

postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· (precomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso z))
#⊗ precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)

precomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
#⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z)) =
enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· (precomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   #⊗ id₁
        (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x),
         G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y) ⦄)
   · enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
       (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
       (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))) =
enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· (id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
   #⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   · enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
       (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))) =
enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
#⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
     (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· (id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
   #⊗ postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   · enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
       (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))) =
id₁
  ((C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
   ⊗ (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄))
· enriched_comp C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (Φ₂ y) (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z))

    · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

x, y, z: B₂
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
#⊗ (postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
      (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
    · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ Φ₂ y, G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob z) ⦄)
#⊗ id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y) =
postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (id₁ (Φ₂ y))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y, z: B₂
inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y = id₁ (Φ₂ y)

          apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ (x y : B₂) (f : B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
enriched_from_arr C₁
  (# enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor f) =
enriched_from_arr B₂ f
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment_data x y
 
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr B₂ f
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
   · precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
       (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr B₂ f
· enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr C₂ (# Φ₂ f)
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

x, y: B₂

enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr C₂
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· inv_from_z_iso

       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr C₂
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
   · inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr C₂
  (# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f) =
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f)
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f)
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))) =
enriched_from_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor f)
· id₁
    (C₁ ⦃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
     enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⦄)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_functor_enrichment G
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)) =
id₁
  (C₁ ⦃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x,
   enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y ⦄)

          exact (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
                   (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
                      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))).
      Qed.
