V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
functor_enrichment enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor B₂ C₁
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_functor_enrichment.
      Defined.

      Definition enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data
        : nat_trans_data
            (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor : enriched_functor _ _)
            Φ₁
        := λ x,
           invmap
             (make_weq _ (G_fully_faithful _ _))
             (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
              · inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)).

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₁
# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
· inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₁
# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
· inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)

        apply (homotweqinvweq (make_weq _ (G_fully_faithful _ _))).
      Qed.

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
is_nat_trans
  (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor
   :
   enriched_functor B₁ C₁) Φ₁
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
is_nat_trans
  (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor
   :
   enriched_functor B₁ C₁) Φ₁
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor) f
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x · # Φ₁ f

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# G
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor (# (pr1 F) f)
   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y) =
# G
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x
   · # Φ₁ f)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor (# (pr1 F) f))
· # G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y) =
# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· # G (# Φ₁ f)

x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_mor (# (pr1 F) f))
· # G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)

· # G (# Φ₁ f) = ?t2

HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)
· # Φ₂ (# (pr1 F) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y))
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
· # (pr1 Φ₂) (# (pr1 F) f)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)
· # Φ₂ (# (pr1 F) f)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y))
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
· # (pr1 Φ₂) (# (pr1 F) f) · id₁ (Φ₂ ((pr11 F) y))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)
· (# Φ₂ (# (pr1 F) f)
   · (inv_from_z_iso
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y))
      · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y))) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
· (# (pr1 Φ₂) (# (pr1 F) f) · id₁ (Φ₂ ((pr11 F) y)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y))
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y) =
id₁ (Φ₂ ((pr11 F) y))

        apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
      Qed.

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
(F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor
 :
 enriched_functor B₁ C₁) ⟹ Φ₁

   :
   enriched_functor B₁ C₁) Φ₁
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans
  (enriched_functor_enrichment
     (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor))
  (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁)

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans
  (enriched_functor_enrichment
     (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor))
  (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x y : B₁,
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans x) =
enriched_functor_enrichment
  (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor) x y
· postcomp_arr C₁
    ((F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor
      :
      enriched_functor B₁ C₁) x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x) =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
   · postcomp_arr C₂
       (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y))))
· postcomp_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x) =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · postcomp_arr C₁
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data
                   y)))))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· id₁ (C₁ ⦃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x), Φ₁ y ⦄) =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · postcomp_arr C₁
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data
                   y)))))
· id₁ (C₁ ⦃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x), Φ₁ y ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y))) =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · postcomp_arr C₁
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data
                   y)))))
· (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)) =
pr2 F x y
· enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
· postcomp_arr C₂
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
· postcomp_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y)
· fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y) =
pr2 F x y
· enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
· postcomp_arr C₂
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
· postcomp_arr C₁ (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data y)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (precomp_arr C₁ (Φ₁ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
   · enriched_functor_enrichment G
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)) (Φ₁ y)) =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · (postcomp_arr C₁
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data
                    y)
               · enriched_functor_enrichment G
                   (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                   (Φ₁ y))))))

V: monoidal_cat

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)

x, y: B₁
?b =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ 
        (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))

              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG

                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · (postcomp_arr C₁
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data
                  y)
               · enriched_functor_enrichment G
                  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                  (Φ₁ y))))))

x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x))) =
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))

              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · (postcomp_arr C₁
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))

                    y)

                   (Φ₁ y))))))

   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))

                   (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                   (Φ₁ y)))))) =

· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)

· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · (enriched_functor_enrichment G
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y))
               · postcomp_arr C₂
                   (G
                      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob
                         (pr1 F x)))
                   (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso
                      ((pr11 F) y)
                    · inv_from_z_iso
                        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                           τ_iso y))))))) = ?b
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
?b =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ 
       (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · (inv_from_z_iso
              (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso
                 HG
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
            · (enriched_functor_enrichment G
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
                 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y))
               · postcomp_arr C₂
                   (G
                      (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob
                         (pr1 F x)))
                   (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso
                      ((pr11 F) y)
                    · inv_from_z_iso
                        (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
                           τ_iso y))))))) = ?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y))
   · postcomp_arr C₂
       (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))) =
?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
inv_from_z_iso
  (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)))
· enriched_functor_enrichment G
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y))
· postcomp_arr C₂
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)) = ?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
id₁
  (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)),
   G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F y)) ⦄)
· postcomp_arr C₂
    (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
     · inv_from_z_iso
         (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)) = ?t2

          apply id_left.
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · (postcomp_arr C₂
           (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y)))
         · postcomp_arr C₂
             (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
             (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
              · inv_from_z_iso
                  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))))) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · postcomp_arr C₂
          (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y))
           · (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
              · inv_from_z_iso
                  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))))) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y))
   · (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
      · inv_from_z_iso
          (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))) = 
?t2

F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
postcomp_arr C₂
  (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F y))
   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)) = ?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
postcomp_arr C₂
  (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
  (id₁ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)) = ?t2

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
postcomp_arr C₂
  (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
  (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)) =
?t2

          apply idpath.
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F y))
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x))
      · postcomp_arr C₂
          (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)))) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F x))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))
      · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F x))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))
      · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) =
?b
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
?b =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ 
       (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
   · (postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F x))
        (inv_from_z_iso
           (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))
      · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) =
?b

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F x))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y))
· precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)) = ?b

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 F x y
· enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ (pr1 F x) (pr1 F y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ (pr1 F x))
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso y)) = ?y'

          exact (!(nat_trans_enrichment_to_comp (τ^-1 : enriched_nat_trans _ _) x y)).
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
enriched_functor_enrichment (Φ₁ · G) x y
· precomp_arr C₂ ((Φ₁ · G) y)
    ((τ ^-1 : enriched_nat_trans (F · Φ₂) (Φ₁ · G)) x)
· precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · inv_from_z_iso
            (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 Φ₁ x y · pr2 G (pr1 Φ₁ x) (pr1 Φ₁ y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 Φ₁ y)) (τ ^-1 x)
· precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · (pr11 τ ^-1) x))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
pr2 Φ₁ x y
· (pr2 G (pr1 Φ₁ x) (pr1 Φ₁ y)
   · (precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 Φ₁ y)) (τ ^-1 x)
      · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)))) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₁ x y
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (Φ₁ x) (Φ₁ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
        · (pr11 τ ^-1) x))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 Φ₁ y)) (τ ^-1 x)
· precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x)) =
precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
   · (pr11 τ ^-1) x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₁
precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 F x) · τ ^-1 x) =
precomp_arr C₂ (G (Φ₁ y))
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso ((pr11 F) x)
   · (pr11 τ ^-1) x)

        apply idpath.
      Qed.

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

enriched_nat_trans
  (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor) Φ₁

x: B₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans x)

        apply (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof
                 _
                 _

                    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (F x))
                    (z_iso_inv (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)))).

x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f

x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · # Φ₂ f
· inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y =

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x
· (# Φ₂ f
   · (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
      · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x · (# Φ₂ f · id₁ (Φ₂ y))

x, y: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y = id₁ (Φ₂ y)

        apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_nat_trans
  (enriched_functor_enrichment
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor · G))
  (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x y : B₂,
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_nat_trans x) =
enriched_functor_enrichment
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor · G) x y
· postcomp_arr C₂
    ((enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor · G
      :
      enriched_functor B₂ C₂) x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_nat_trans y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
· pr2 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)

x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· id₁ (C₂ ⦃ pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄) =
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y) (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

· inv_from_z_iso
    (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_z_iso HG
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
       (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
· pr2 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)

x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂ x y
· (precomp_arr C₂ (Φ₂ y)
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso x)
   · id₁
       (C₂ ⦃ pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x), Φ₂ y ⦄)) =

         · (pr2 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
              (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)

  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))

        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y))
   · (pr2 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x)
        (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y)

          (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)))

  (C₂ ⦃ G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x),
   G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob y) ⦄)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

postcomp_arr C₂ (G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y))
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

x, y: B₂
postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))
  (inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y) =

Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x, y: B₂
postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob x))

   · enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y) =

x, y: B₂
inv_from_z_iso (enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y)
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso y = id₁ (Φ₂ y)

        apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
      Qed.

  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor · G) Φ₂

HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
nat_trans_enrichment 
  ?τ
  (enriched_functor_enrichment
     (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor · G))
  (enriched_functor_enrichment Φ₂)

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
(enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor · G) ⟹ Φ₂
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_nat_trans.

(enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_inv2cell ▹ G) • τ =
rassociator F enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor G
• (F ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_inv2cell)

τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)

(enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_inv2cell ▹ G) • τ =
rassociator F enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor G
• (F ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_inv2cell)

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∏ x : B₁,
((enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_inv2cell ▹ G) • τ) x =
(rassociator F enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor G
 • (F ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_inv2cell)) x

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₁
# (pr11 G)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· pr1 τ x =
id₁ (pr1 G (enriched_eso_ff_lift_ob (pr1 F x)))
· enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)

x: B₁

  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· pr1 τ x = enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)

τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₁
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
· (inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)
   · nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x) =
# (pr11 G)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· pr1 τ x

x: B₁
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
· inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)
· nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x =
# (pr11 G)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)
· pr1 τ x

x: B₁
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
· inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x) =
# (pr11 G)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: enriched_functor B₁ C₁
Φ₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
τ_iso:= from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched V τ: nat_z_iso (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
x: B₁
# (pr11 G)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data x) =
enriched_eso_ff_lift_z_iso (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
· inv_from_z_iso (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso τ_iso x)

        exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_nat_trans_data_eq x).
      Qed.
    End Lift1Cell.

    
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_essentially_surjective F G

    
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_essentially_surjective F G

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
∑ (l : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧)
(ζ₁ : invertible_2cell (F · l) Φ₁)
(ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (l · G) Φ₂),
(ζ₁ ▹ G) • τ = rassociator F l G • (F ◃ ζ₂)

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
invertible_2cell (F · ?pr1) Φ₁
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
invertible_2cell (?pr1 · G) Φ₂
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (?pr1 · G) Φ₂,
 (?pr10 ▹ G) • τ = rassociator F ?pr1 G • (F ◃ ζ₂))
  ?pr11

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor Φ₁ Φ₂ τ).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
invertible_2cell
  (F · enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor Φ₁ Φ₂ τ)
  Φ₁
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_inv2cell Φ₁ Φ₂ τ).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
invertible_2cell
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor Φ₁ Φ₂ τ · G)
  Φ₂
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_inv2cell Φ₁ Φ₂ τ).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, C₁ ⟧
Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₂ ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell (Φ₁ · G) (F · Φ₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell
          (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor Φ₁ Φ₂
             τ · G) Φ₂,
 (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm1_inv2cell Φ₁ Φ₂ τ ▹ G) • τ =
 rassociator F
   (enriched_eso_ff_lift_enriched_functor Φ₁ Φ₂ τ) G
 • (F ◃ ζ₂))
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm2_inv2cell Φ₁ Φ₂ τ)
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_comm_eq Φ₁ Φ₂ τ).
    Defined.

    (** * 4. Lifts of 2-cells *)
    Section Lift2Cell.
      Context {L₁ L₂ : enriched_functor B₂ C₁}
              (τ₁ : enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂))
              (τ₂ : enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G))
              (p : (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G
                   =
                   rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)).

      Section Lift2CellData.
        Context (x : B₂).

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
isaprop (∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
isaprop (∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
f = g

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
isPredicate (λ x0 : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G x0 = τ₂ x)
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
pr1 f = pr1 g

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
isPredicate (λ x0 : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G x0 = τ₂ x)

            
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
x0: C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧
isaprop (# G x0 = τ₂ x)

            apply homset_property.
          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
pr1 f = pr1 g

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
make_weq # G (G_fully_faithful (L₁ x) (L₂ x)) (pr1 f) =
make_weq # G (G_fully_faithful (L₁ x) (L₂ x)) (pr1 g)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
f, g: ∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x
# G (pr1 f) = # G (pr1 g)

          exact (pr2 f @ !(pr2 g)).
        Qed.

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
∃! f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
∃! f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
isaprop (∑ f : C₁ ⟦ L₁ x, L₂ x ⟧, # G f = τ₂ x)
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful

x: B₂
# G
  (invmap

     ((pr11 τ₂) x)) = τ₂ x

p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
nat_trans_enrichment
  enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans
  (enriched_functor_enrichment L₁)
  (enriched_functor_enrichment L₂)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
∏ x y : B₂,
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans x) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans y)

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans x) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans x)
· id₁ (C₁ ⦃ L₁ x, L₂ y ⦄) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans y)
· id₁ (C₁ ⦃ L₁ x, L₂ y ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y),,
        HG (L₁ x) (L₂ y))) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
· (enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y),,
        HG (L₁ x) (L₂ y)))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y),,
     HG (L₁ x) (L₂ y)) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y),,
     HG (L₁ x) (L₂ y))

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y) =
pr2 L₂ x y · pr2 G (pr1 L₂ x) (pr1 L₂ y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₂ y)) (τ₂ x)
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
pr2 L₁ x y · pr2 G (pr1 L₁ x) (pr1 L₁ y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₁ x)) (τ₂ y) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y) =
pr2 L₂ x y · pr2 G (pr1 L₂ x) (pr1 L₂ y)

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment L₂ x y
· (precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
     (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
   · enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)) =
pr2 L₂ x y
· (pr2 G (pr1 L₂ x) (pr1 L₂ y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₂ y)) (τ₂ x))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
precomp_arr C₁ (L₂ y)
  (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y) =
pr2 G (pr1 L₂ x) (pr1 L₂ y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₂ y)) (τ₂ x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₂ x) (L₂ y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (G (L₂ y))
    (# G (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x)) =
pr2 G (pr1 L₂ x) (pr1 L₂ y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₂ y)) (τ₂ x)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
# G (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x) = τ₂ x

          apply iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_eq.
        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful

L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
pr2 L₁ x y · pr2 G (pr1 L₁ x) (pr1 L₁ y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₁ x)) (τ₂ y) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
    (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)
 
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
pr2 L₁ x y
· (pr2 G (pr1 L₁ x) (pr1 L₁ y)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₁ x)) (τ₂ y)) =
enriched_functor_enrichment L₁ x y
· (postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
     (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
   · enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
pr2 G (pr1 L₁ x) (pr1 L₁ y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₁ x)) (τ₂ y) =
postcomp_arr C₁ (L₁ x)
  (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)
· enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₂ y)

          
V: monoidal_cat

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
pr2 G (pr1 L₁ x) (pr1 L₁ y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (pr1 G (pr1 L₁ x)) (τ₂ y) =
enriched_functor_enrichment G (L₁ x) (L₁ y)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G (L₁ x))
    (# G (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y))

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
τ₂ y = # G (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y)

          
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x, y: B₂
# G (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el y) = τ₂ y

          apply iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_eq.
      Qed.

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
enriched_nat_trans L₁ L₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
enriched_nat_trans L₁ L₂

        refine (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_nat_trans ,, enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enrichment).
      Defined.

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
F ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans = τ₁

p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =

∏ x : B₁,
(F ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans) x =

τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₁
iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el (pr1 (pr1 F) x) =
τ₁ x

p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₁
τ₁ x =
iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el (pr1 (pr1 F) x)

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
