HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₁
# G (τ₁ x) = τ₂ (pr1 F x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₁
q:= from_eq_enriched_nat_trans p x: ((τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G) x =
(rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)) x
# G (τ₁ x) = τ₂ (pr1 F x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₁
q:= from_eq_enriched_nat_trans p x: # (pr11 G) ((pr11 τ₁) x)
· id₁ (pr1 G (pr1 L₂ (pr1 F x))) =
id₁ (pr1 G (pr1 L₁ (pr1 F x)))
· (pr11 τ₂) (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
# G (τ₁ x) = τ₂ (pr1 F x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: enriched_functor B₂ C₁
τ₁: enriched_nat_trans (F · L₁) (F · L₂)
τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₁
q: # (pr11 G) ((pr11 τ₁) x) =
(pr11 τ₂) (pr1 (pr1 F) x)
# G (τ₁ x) = τ₂ (pr1 F x)

        exact q.
      Qed.

τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans ▹ G = τ₂

p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =

p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F

τ₂: enriched_nat_trans (L₁ · G) (L₂ · G)
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
x: B₂
# (pr11 G) (iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_el x) =
τ₂ x

        apply iscontr_enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_eq.
      Qed.
    End Lift2Cell.

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_full F G

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ₁: F · L₁ ==> F · L₂
τ₂: L₁ · G ==> L₂ · G
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
∑ ξ : L₁ ==> L₂, F ◃ ξ = τ₁ × ξ ▹ G = τ₂

τ₂: L₁ · G ==> L₂ · G
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
L₁ ==> L₂

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

τ₂: L₁ · G ==> L₂ · G
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
(λ _ : F ◃ ?pr1 = τ₁, ?pr1 ▹ G = τ₂) ?pr10

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

τ₁: F · L₁ ==> F · L₂
τ₂: L₁ · G ==> L₂ · G
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
L₁ ==> L₂
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans τ₂).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

τ₁: F · L₁ ==> F · L₂
τ₂: L₁ · G ==> L₂ · G
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
F ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans τ₂ =
τ₁
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans_eq_F _ _ p).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
L₁, L₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
τ₁: F · L₁ ==> F · L₂
τ₂: L₁ · G ==> L₂ · G
p: (τ₁ ▹ G) • rassociator F L₂ G =
rassociator F L₁ G • (F ◃ τ₂)
(λ _ : F
       ◃ enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans
           τ₂ = τ₁,
 enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans τ₂ ▹ G =
 τ₂)
  (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans_eq_F
     τ₁ τ₂ p)
 exact (enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell_enriched_nat_trans_eq_G τ₂).
    Defined.

    (** * 5. Uniqueness of lifts of 2-cells *)
    
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_faithful F G

B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁, Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: Φ₁ ==> Φ₂
p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂
q: ζ₁ ▹ G = ζ₂ ▹ G
ζ₁ = ζ₂

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

ζ₁, ζ₂: Φ₁ ==> Φ₂
p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂
q: ζ₁ ▹ G = ζ₂ ▹ G
∏ x : B₂, ζ₁ x = ζ₂ x

V: monoidal_cat

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂

p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂

faithful G
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V

G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G

p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂
q: ζ₁ ▹ G = ζ₂ ▹ G
x: B₂
H: faithful G
ζ₁ x = ζ₂ x

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁, Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: Φ₁ ==> Φ₂
p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂
q: ζ₁ ▹ G = ζ₂ ▹ G
x: B₂
faithful G

        exact (fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_faithful _ HG).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁, Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: Φ₁ ==> Φ₂
p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂
q: ζ₁ ▹ G = ζ₂ ▹ G
x: B₂
H: faithful G
ζ₁ x = ζ₂ x

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Φ₁, Φ₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₂, C₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: Φ₁ ==> Φ₂
p: F ◃ ζ₁ = F ◃ ζ₂
q: ζ₁ ▹ G = ζ₂ ▹ G
x: B₂
H: faithful G
(λ f : C₁ ⟦ Φ₁ x, Φ₂ x ⟧, # G f) (ζ₁ x) =
(λ f : C₁ ⟦ Φ₁ x, Φ₂ x ⟧, # G f) (ζ₂ x)

      exact (from_eq_enriched_nat_trans q x).
    Qed.

    
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
F ⊥ G

    
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
F ⊥ G

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Univalence.is_univalent_2_1 (bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_full F G
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_faithful F G
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_essentially_surjective F G

      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
Univalence.is_univalent_2_1 (bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
 exact (is_univalent_2_1_bicat_of_enriched_cats V).
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_full F G
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_2cell.
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_faithful F G
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_eq.
      
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor B₁ B₂
G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF: enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ F
HG: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G
G_fully_faithful:= fully_faithful_enriched_functor_to_fully_faithful
  (enriched_functor_enrichment G) HG: fully_faithful G
orthogonal_essentially_surjective F G
 exact enriched_eso_ff_lift_1cell.
    Defined.
  End Lifting.

  (** * 6. Fully faithful 1-cells are closed under invertible 2-cells *)
  Section FullyFaithfulInv2cell.
    Context {C₁ C₂ : enriched_cat V}
            {F G : enriched_functor C₁ C₂}
            (τ : invertible_2cell F G)
            (HF : enriched_ff_1cell _ _ F).

    Let τc : enriched_nat_trans _ _ := pr1 τ.
    Let τi : enriched_nat_trans _ _ := τ^-1.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x: C₁
τi x · τc x = id₁ (G x)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x: C₁
τi x · τc x = id₁ (G x)

      exact (from_eq_enriched_nat_trans (vcomp_linv τ) x).
    Qed.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x: C₁
τc x · τi x = id₁ (F x)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x: C₁
τc x · τi x = id₁ (F x)

      exact (from_eq_enriched_nat_trans (vcomp_rinv τ) x).
    Qed.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
z_iso (C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) (C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
z_iso (C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄) (C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄, C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄, C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄, C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄ ⟧
 exact (precomp_arr _ _ (τi x) · postcomp_arr _ _ (τc y)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
V ⟦ C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄, C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄ ⟧
 exact (precomp_arr _ _ (τc x) · postcomp_arr _ _ (τi y)).
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
is_inverse_in_precat
  (precomp_arr C₂ (F y) (τi x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G x) (τc y))
  (precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τi y))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr C₂ (F y) (τi x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G x) (τc y)
· (precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τi y)) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τi y)
· (precomp_arr C₂ (F y) (τi x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G x) (τc y)) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr C₂ (F y) (τi x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (G x) (τc y)
· (precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τi y)) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ F x, F y ⦄)
 abstract
            (rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite <- precomp_postcomp_arr ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite <- postcomp_arr_comp ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite <- precomp_arr_comp ;
             rewrite !enriched_fully_faithful_iso_right ;
             rewrite precomp_arr_id ;
             rewrite postcomp_arr_id ;
             apply id_right).
        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
· postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τi y)
· (precomp_arr C₂ (F y) (τi x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G x) (τc y)) =
id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)
 abstract
            (rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ · z) (assoc _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite <- precomp_postcomp_arr ;
             rewrite !assoc' ;
             rewrite <- postcomp_arr_comp ;
             rewrite !assoc ;
             rewrite <- precomp_arr_comp ;
             rewrite !enriched_fully_faithful_iso_left ;
             rewrite precomp_arr_id ;
             rewrite postcomp_arr_id ;
             apply id_right).
    Defined.

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ G

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_functor_enrichment G x y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_functor_enrichment G x y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· (precomp_arr C₂ (F y) (τi x)
   · postcomp_arr C₂ (G x) (τc y))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· (postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τc y)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τi x))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· postcomp_arr C₂ (F x) (τc y)
· precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τi x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
· precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τi x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y
· (precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τc x)
   · precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τi x))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (τi x · τc x)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y
· precomp_arr C₂ (G y) (id₁ (G x))

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y
· id₁ (C₂ ⦃ G x, G y ⦄)

        
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment G x y

        apply idpath.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_functor_enrichment G x y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism
  (enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
   · enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_functor_enrichment F x y)
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y)

      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_functor_enrichment F x y)
 apply HF.
      
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F, G: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
τ: invertible_2cell F G
HF: enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F
τc:= pr1 τ: enriched_nat_trans F G
τi:= τ ^-1: enriched_nat_trans G F
x, y: C₁
p: enriched_functor_enrichment G x y =
enriched_functor_enrichment F x y
· enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (enriched_fully_faithful_hom_iso x y)
 apply z_iso_is_z_isomorphism.
    Qed.
  End FullyFaithfulInv2cell.

  (** * 7. The factorization system *)
  
V: monoidal_cat
orthogonal_factorization_system
  (bicat_of_enriched_cats V)

  
V: monoidal_cat
orthogonal_factorization_system
  (bicat_of_enriched_cats V)

    
V: monoidal_cat
∏ x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V,
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
V: monoidal_cat
∏ x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V,
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
V: monoidal_cat
∏ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
(f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop (?L x y f)
V: monoidal_cat
∏ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
(f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop (?R x y f)
V: monoidal_cat
∏ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
(f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
factorization_1cell
  (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
   ?L x0 y0 f0,, ?isapropL x0 y0 f0)
  (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
   ?R x0 y0 f0,, ?isapropR x0 y0 f0) f
V: monoidal_cat
closed_under_invertible_2cell
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   ?L x y f,, ?isapropL x y f)
V: monoidal_cat
closed_under_invertible_2cell
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   ?R x y f,, ?isapropR x y f)
V: monoidal_cat
orthogonal_maps
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   ?L x y f,, ?isapropL x y f)
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   ?R x y f,, ?isapropR x y f)

    
V: monoidal_cat
∏ x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V,
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact enriched_eso_1cell.
    
V: monoidal_cat
∏ x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V,
bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU
 exact enriched_ff_1cell.
    
V: monoidal_cat
∏ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
(f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop
  ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_eso_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f)
 
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: bicat_of_enriched_cats V
f: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_eso_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f)

      apply propproperty.
    
V: monoidal_cat
∏ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
(f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
isaprop
  ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f)
 
V: monoidal_cat
x, y: bicat_of_enriched_cats V
f: bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f)

      apply propproperty.
    
V: monoidal_cat
∏ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
(f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
factorization_1cell
  (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
   (λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_eso_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x0 y0 f0,,
   (λ (x1 y1 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (f1 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧),
    propproperty (enriched_eso_1cell x1 y1 f1)) x0 y0
     f0)
  (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
   (λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x0 y0 f0,,
   (λ (x1 y1 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (f1 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x1, y1 ⟧),
    propproperty (enriched_ff_1cell x1 y1 f1)) x0 y0
     f0) f
 exact (λ _ _ F, enriched_eso_ff_factorization F).
    
V: monoidal_cat
closed_under_invertible_2cell
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   (λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_eso_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f,,
   (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
    propproperty (enriched_eso_1cell x0 y0 f0)) x y f)
 abstract
        (intros C₁ C₂ F G τ HF ; cbn ;
         use (essentially_surjective_nat_z_iso _ HF) ;
         exact (from_is_invertible_2cell_enriched _ τ)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
closed_under_invertible_2cell
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   (λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f,,
   (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
    propproperty (enriched_ff_1cell x0 y0 f0)) x y f)
 abstract
        (intros C₁ C₂ F G τ HF ; cbn ;
         exact (enriched_fully_faithful_invertible_2cell τ HF)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
orthogonal_maps
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   (λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_eso_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f,,
   (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
    propproperty (enriched_eso_1cell x0 y0 f0)) x y f)
  (λ (x y : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
   (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   (λ (C₁ C₂ : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (F : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
    enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ F) x y f,,
   (λ (x0 y0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V)
    (f0 : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ x0, y0 ⟧),
    propproperty (enriched_ff_1cell x0 y0 f0)) x y f)
 
V: monoidal_cat
B₁, B₂, C₁, C₂: bicat_of_enriched_cats V
∏ (f : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ B₁, B₂ ⟧)
(g : bicat_of_enriched_cats V ⟦ C₁, C₂ ⟧),
enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ f,,
propproperty (enriched_eso_1cell B₁ B₂ f)
→ enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ g,,
  propproperty (enriched_ff_1cell C₁ C₂ g) → f ⊥ g

      exact enriched_eso_ff_orthogonal.
  Defined.

  (** * 8. Essentially surjective+fully faithful implies adjoint equivalence *)
  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
left_adjoint_equivalence F

  
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
left_adjoint_equivalence F

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
orthogonal_left_class
  enriched_eso_ff_orthogonal_factorization_system F
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
orthogonal_right_class
  enriched_eso_ff_orthogonal_factorization_system F

    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
orthogonal_left_class
  enriched_eso_ff_orthogonal_factorization_system F
 exact HF₁.
    
V: monoidal_cat
C₁, C₂: enriched_cat V
F: enriched_functor C₁ C₂
HF₁: essentially_surjective F
HF₂: fully_faithful_enriched_functor (enriched_functor_enrichment F)
orthogonal_right_class
  enriched_eso_ff_orthogonal_factorization_system F
 exact HF₂.
  Defined.
End EnrichedFactorizationSystem.
